rationale: Review 2's single-unit scope finding is directly confirmed by the diff (foundational AffineAlgGroup+AlgPoints mixed with IsUnipotent+ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup stubs using True/nilpotence), so acting on it produces a narrowly-scoped Layer-0 PR; Review 1's bundling fix instead forces an unnecessary rewrite of those foundations without fixing the mixed-layers issue.
